title: elaeocarpus cupreus
intro: Elaeocarpus cupreus, also known as the Copperleaf or Copper Berry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Elaeocarpus cupreus include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and improve digestion. Elaeocarpus cupreus can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, or used as a tincture or infusion in traditional medicine.
